title: Engineering at Deliveroo India: How We Build, Collaborate, and Grow

title: Cost Optimisation in ECS: Integrating Spot Instances at Scale
summary: At Deliveroo, we’re always refining how we scale - especially when it comes to managing compute costs in the cloud.
